name: Tee'd Off Winchester
about: Tee'd Off Winchester is an indoor golf club featuring state-of-the-art simulators designed to provide a premium golf experience regardless of weather conditions. The facility offers access to world-renowned courses and real-time analytics for game improvement, catering to both seasoned golfers and beginners. Membership plans are available for frequent players, including options for 4-8 free hours per month with discounts on additional time, while the venue also hosts corporate events, team-building activities, and private parties.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulators with real-time analytics and feedback
Flexible booking options and premium equipment
Welcoming environment suitable for all skill levels
Availability for corporate events and team-building activities

food_and_drink.notes: Premium equipment and a comfortable, welcoming environment, suggesting food service is available

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides premium equipment, but bringing your own clubs is also an option.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.notes: The venue offers premium equipment and a comfortable, welcoming environment, suggesting that bringing outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round varies based on simulator usage and number of players, typically taking 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee'd Off is designed to be family-friendly and welcomes children for casual get-togethers and birthday parties.
